name: Suddenly Meow Christmas
short_description: A fun holiday adventure with furballs Tim and Spooky! A blend of Match 3 and Puzzle like no other!
detailed_description:
Get ready for a holiday adventure packed with fun alongside Tim and Spooky! Guide these cheeky furballs through 90 jolly levels where you'll tackle Match 3 puzzles to help Tim snag his frosty fish treats and assist Spooky in tracking down Christmas gift boxes. Suddenly Meow Christmas features a hilarious storyline set in Grandma's house, where you'll help spruce up her living room and save it from a cat-astrophe! Plus, enjoy hidden object challenges and quirky minigames that amp up the festive fun. Perfect for cat lovers and puzzle fans, this whimsical game is your ticket to a merry escape this Christmas season. Join the furry frolic and make magical holiday memories!

Features:

  • 90 Match 3 levels to conquer.

  • Humorous Christmas story.

  • Save Grandma's living room.

  • Hidden objects and other minigames.

  • Collect stars to prove your mastery.

  • Many more challenges.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Dutch, Portuguese - Brazil
